base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of items — a pickup_item (currency) from 1992 super mario kart. Item icons — Mushroom/Banana/Green Shell/Red Shell/Ghost/Star/Feather/Lightning/Coin. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
